things.name: National Museum & Art Gallery
things.description: Masks, ceremonial objects and artefacts from Papua New Guinea's 800+ tribes

things.name: Kokoda Track (Historical Trail)
things.description: WWII jungle track 96km over the Owen Stanley Ranges - one of history's greatest battles

things.name: Parliament House
things.description: Spectacular 1984 building combining traditional Sepik haus tambaran with modern architecture

things.name: Port Moresby Nature Park
things.description: Tree kangaroos, birds of paradise and cassowaries in a natural conservation park

things.name: Bird of Paradise Watching
things.description: PNG has 38 of the world's 42 bird of paradise species - the most spectacular birds on Earth

things.name: Ela Beach
things.description: Popular city beach with the Ela Beach Hotel and afternoon market

things.name: Bomana War Cemetery
things.description: Commonwealth War Graves for the 3,824 Allied soldiers who fell defending Port Moresby

things.name: Varirata National Park
things.description: Rainforest 40km from the city with birds of paradise and magnificent coastal views

things.name: Goroka Show Day Trip
things.description: Highlands tribal gathering with 100+ tribes in traditional sing-sing dress

things.name: Betel Nut (Buai) Market Experience
things.description: Papua New Guinea's favourite chew - the red-staining nut sold everywhere
